title: calcitrapa calcitrapa
intro: Calcitrapa calcitrapa, also known as the Nettle Leaved Goosefoot, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of calcitrapa calcitrapa include its ability to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Calcitrapa calcitrapa is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
